name: Python Virtualenv On HPC
summary: Create lightweight Python virtual environments with explicit HPC module assumptions.
description: This skill helps users build user-owned Python virtual environments on HPC systems while recording module state, Python version, package inputs, and activation steps for reproducible jobs.

inputs.name: venv_path
inputs.description: User-owned virtual environment path, preferably on project or software storage.

inputs.name: requirements_file
inputs.description: Pinned pip requirements file to install after environment creation.

inputs.name: python_module
inputs.description: Site-specific Python module loaded before creating the virtual environment.

outputs.name: virtual_environment
outputs.description: A user-owned Python virtual environment with activation instructions.

outputs.name: environment_record
outputs.description: Text record of Python, pip, loaded modules, and package freeze output.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Create a small virtual environment in a temporary user-owned directory and confirm the environment record is written.
